title: Delicate Crisp Peruvian Beef Anticuchos
description: A kid-friendly Peruvian dish featuring ssamjang and miso-marinate, perfect for a sugar-free friendly meal.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a blender, combine miso paste, ssamjang, garlic, and ginger to make the marinade.
Place the beef heart in a large bowl and pour the marinade over it, making sure it is fully coated.
Let the beef marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the marinated beef onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the anticuchos for 3-4 minutes per side, or until they are cooked to an internal temperature of 145 degrees.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the anticuchos hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
